channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Outcry as Chiredzi man spends second night in prison over viral Mnangagwa, Chivayo criticism @wicknellchivayo
item.description: A Chiredzi man arrested on allegations of incitement to commit public violence following a viral video in which he criticised President Emmerson Mnangagwa and businessman Wicknell Chivayo spent a second night behind bars Wednesday after failing to secure bail. Tafadzwa Nelston Matanhuse, 32, remained in custody after the Chiredzi Magistrates Court scheduled his bail ruling [...] The post Outcry as Chiredzi man spends second night in prison over viral Mnangagwa, Chivayo criticism appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: SADC Finance Ministers to meet in Harare to advance financial integration
item.description: The Southern African Development Community (SADC) will hold a high-level meeting of its Committee of Ministers of Finance and Investment alongside the Peer Review Panel on July 2, 2026, in Harare, Zimbabwe. The meeting aims to deepen regional economic co-operation, strengthen macroeconomic surveillance, and co-ordinate investment and capital market integration across the bloc. South African [...] The post SADC Finance Ministers to meet in Harare to advance financial integration appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: International scouts eye young Zimbabwean talent at Total Football International Showcase
item.description: Young Zimbabwean footballers will have a rare opportunity to showcase their talent to international scouts and agents when Total Football Academy hosts the Total Football International Showcase 2026 in Harare from July 4 to 11. The week-long event is expected to attract talented players from across the country and will feature separate categories for junior [...] The post International scouts eye young Zimbabwean talent at Total Football International Showcase appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Senate passes constitutional amendments to extend Mnangagwa’s term @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: Zanu PF did not have required two thirds majority and relied on chiefs - and CCC senators The post Senate passes constitutional amendments to extend Mnangagwa’s term appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. (via Zimbabwean News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Zimbabwe’s Economy Rebased to US$59.7 Billion as ZIMSTAT Reports 8.3% Growth in 2025
item.description: HARARE – Zimbabwe’s economy expanded to an estimated US$59.7 billion in 2025, following a major rebasing exercise by the Zimbabwe National Statistics Agency (ZIMSTAT) that updated the country’s Gross Domestic Product (GDP) reference year from 2023 to 2025. According to newly released national accounts data, GDP at current market prices reached ZWG1.55 trillion in 2025, [...] The post Zimbabwe’s Economy Rebased to US$59.7 Billion as ZIMSTAT Reports 8.3% Growth in 2025 appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Armed police raid Constitution Defenders Forum offices, official arrested @zimsituation
item.description: ‘We view this as an attempt to intimidate citizens and activists exercising their constitutional rights’ Source: Armed police raid Constitution Defenders Forum offices, official arrested – Zimbabwe News Now CDF activist Paul Gorekore HARARE — Armed police raided the offices of the Constitution Defenders Forum on Tuesday night and seized several items including T-shirts and [...] The post Armed police raid Constitution Defenders Forum offices, official arrested appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: CCC senators blow hot and cold on bill to extend Mnangagwa rule @zimsituation
item.description: ‘If we as parliament can extend our term once, what will stop us from doing so again and again?’ Source: CCC senators blow hot and cold on bill to extend Mnangagwa rule – Zimbabwe News Now CCC senator Solani Moyo HARARE — Citizens Coalition for Change lawmakers were sharply divided in their contributions to Tuesday’s [...] The post CCC senators blow hot and cold on bill to extend Mnangagwa rule appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
